displayTitle: The High Republic (2023) Phase III Vol. 1. Children of the Storm
synopsis:
The High Republic (2023) Phase III Vol. 1. Children of the Storm
A canon trade paperback that collects issues 1-4 from the Marvel Comics The High Republic (2023) Series and one-shot All the Republic previously published in Revelations (2023) 1
Commencing Phase III of the High Republic era!
Following recent devastating events, the Jedi are in shambles. Months after the Starlight Beacon fell, Keeve Trennis finds herself at a crossroads. How will the Jedi Order recover from the damage dealt by the Nihil? Can they?
Collecting : The High Republic (2023) #1-4
title: The High Republic (2023) Phase III Vol. 1. Children of the Storm
